zh.lifeSummary: 當Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912於1085年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯格拉也-素-梅時，他的父親Architel De Grai Of Rotherford33歲，母親Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3R66歲。他於1070年與Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1138年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾斯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912于1085年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯格拉也-素-梅时，他的父亲Architel De Grai Of Rotherford33岁，母亲Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3R66岁。他于1070年与Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1138年在英国英格兰奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾艾斯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

en.lifeSummary: When Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912 was born in 1085, in Graye-sur-Mer, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Architel De Grai Of Rotherford, was 33 and his mother, Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3R, was 66. He married Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield in 1070, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1138, in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Eynsham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912 est né en 1085, à Graye-sur-Mer, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Architel De Grai Of Rotherford, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3R, avait 66 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield en 1070, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1138, à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Eynsham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield nel 1070, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912が1085年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスグレイエ-スル-マーで生まれた時，父Architel De Grai Of Rotherfordは33歳，母Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3Rは66歳であった。1070年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでLady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1138年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエインシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912(이)가 1085년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 그라예-수-머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Architel De Grai Of Rotherford(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3R(은)는 66세였다. 그는 1070년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1138년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 이샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912 nasceu em 1085, em Graye-sur-Mer, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Architel De Grai Of Rotherford, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3R, tinha 66 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield em 1070, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1138, em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Eynsham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912 родился в 1085 г. в местности греие-сур-мир, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Architel De Grai Of Rotherford было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3R, 66. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield в 1070 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1138 г. в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности эиншам, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Architel de Grey Of Rothenfield G2CH-912 nació en 1085, en Graye-sur-Mer, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Architel De Grai Of Rotherford, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mrs. Hugh de Grai, G29Y-K3R, tenía 66 años. Se casó con Lady Joan De Grey Of Rotherfield en 1070, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1138, en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Eynsham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
